name: mindfck
description: Christopher Wylie's Mindf*ck — the whistleblower's account of how Cambridge Analytica weaponized Facebook data for psychological warfare, election interference, and the alt-right insurgency.
useCase: Understand how data-driven psychological warfare and election interference actually worked — from Facebook data harvesting and psychometric profiling to Brexit and Trump campaign manipulation. Includes frameworks for recognizing propaganda, protecting digital privacy, and regulating surveillance capitalism.
knownRisks: Contains detailed descriptions of psychological manipulation techniques that could be misused if read by bad actors
Covers ongoing political controversies; users may have strong emotional reactions
Some claims are contested by named individuals and organizations
Technical concepts (API permissions, psychometrics, neural networks) may require explanation for non-technical users
